customEffectDescriptions.li: Healing: for each mutation (mutation level * 2) hp/day
Mutations obtained in this way differ from the standard ones.
If the mutation fails, one of the <color=#b0bf80>mutations progresses</color> and becomes stronger.

GeneDef.label: fleshmass nucleus
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that form inside the fleshmass nucleus. It causes constant mutations. However, the death of the carrier can cause the appearance of a fleshmass heart.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Death of the gene carrier spawns a <color=#b0bf80>fleshmass heart</color>.

GeneDef.label: fleshmass heart
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that form inside the fleshmass heart. It causes constant mutations. However, the death of the carrier can cause the appearance of a fleshmass entity.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Death of the gene carrier spawns a <color=#b0bf80>fingerspike</color> or <color=#b0bf80>toughspike</color>.
